senses.gloss: to become acquainted, with, to meet

examples.english: We got to know each other in college.

examples.text: عِنْدَمَا الْتَقَيْتُ بِهِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ، بَدَأْنَا نَتَعَرَّفُ عَلَى بَعْضِنَا الْبَعْضِ.
examples.english: When I met him for the first time, we started to get to know each other.

senses.gloss: (for a noun) to be or to become definite
